title: String literals should not be duplicated
description: String literals should not be duplicatedAnalyze your codeadaptability-distinctmaintainabilityCode SmelldesignWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?Duplicated string literals make the process of refactoring complex and error-prone, as any change would need to be propagated on all occurrences.ExceptionsTo prevent generating some false-positives, literals having less than 10 characters are excluded as well as literals matching/^\w*$/. String literals inside import/export statements and JSX attributes are also ignored. The same goes for statement-like string literals, e.g.'use strict';.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: String literal appears to be duplicated - consider extracting to a constant to improve maintainability.
